description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jekyll/minimal:3.8 Docker image. Define a single deploy stage with a job named pages that runs the script commands: jekyll build -d public, then page_files=$(find public -name "*.html" -not -name index.html), and for each file move it to the same name without the .html extension (for file in $page_files; do mv $file ${file%.*}; done). The job publishes the public directory as a pages artifact and is configured to run only on the master branch, deploying to GitLab Pages.
